name: Wild Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10.75 oz) cream of mushroom soup
2 packages (7 oz each) wild rice & long-grain converted rice mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a Crock-Pot.
2. Stir thoroughly to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 10 hours or on High for 2 to 3 1/2 hours.
Serves 6 to 8
